summary: Tested P0 bug fix (revenue-by-payment respecting assigned_week) and new feature (validated invoices + completed expenses tables in Activite tab). All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - both new tables with data-testid attributes working correctly with proper columns and totals matching summary cards.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/revenue-by-payment returns 200 with total, count, by_method
✅ Backend: revenue-by-payment with week_start parameter works correctly
✅ Backend: revenue-by-payment with date parameter works correctly
✅ Backend: Payment method normalization (mobile_money->mobile, especes->cash, cheque, bon-client->wallet)
✅ Backend: GET /api/reports/weekly returns 200 with sales.total and daily data
✅ Backend: weekly report with week_start parameter works correctly
✅ Backend: CRITICAL - revenue-by-payment total MATCHES weekly report sales.total for current week (38000 F)
✅ Backend: CRITICAL - revenue-by-payment total MATCHES weekly report sales.total for previous week (13000 F)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/invoices/{id}/assign-week endpoint exists
✅ Backend: POST /api/invoices/unassign-week-bulk endpoint works with {ids: []}
✅ Backend: assigned_week behavior - invoice excluded from original week and included in target week after assignment
✅ Backend: Daily mode revenue-by-payment works correctly
✅ Frontend: Admin login with password 'Caisse2026' works
✅ Frontend: Activite & Historique tab accessible
✅ Frontend: data-testid='activity-validated-invoices' card present when validated invoices exist
✅ Frontend: Validated invoices table has all 6 columns: Facture, Client, Serveur, Mode, Total, Heure
✅ Frontend: data-testid='activity-completed-expenses' card present when completed expenses exist
✅ Frontend: Completed expenses table has all 5 columns: Description, Fournisseur, Categorie, Montant, Heure
✅ Frontend: Summary card CA VALIDE total matches validated invoices table title total
✅ Frontend: Summary card DEPENSES total matches completed expenses table title total
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: revenue-by-payment now uses same assigned_week logic as weekly report
Both endpoints return identical totals (38000 F for current week, 13000 F for previous week)
Payment method normalization working correctly (mobile_money->mobile, especes->cash, etc.)
Frontend tables only appear when data exists (todayInvs.length > 0 or completedExp.length > 0) - correct behavior
data-testid attributes properly added for testing automation
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test invoice (EM-20260417-0001) and expense for frontend verification, then cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: /api/reports/revenue-by-payment now respects assigned_week field and matches /api/reports/weekly totals. New feature verified: Activite & Historique tab shows validated invoices table (data-testid='activity-validated-invoices') and completed expenses table (data-testid='activity-completed-expenses') with proper columns and totals matching summary cards.

revenue_by_payment_assigned_week.notes: Totals match weekly report for both current and previous weeks

activity_validated_invoices_table.notes: data-testid='activity-validated-invoices' with columns: Facture, Client, Serveur, Mode, Total, Heure

activity_completed_expenses_table.notes: data-testid='activity-completed-expenses' with columns: Description, Fournisseur, Categorie, Montant, Heure

summary_totals_consistency.notes: CA VALIDE and DEPENSES card totals match table title totals
